options.content: Hypertension DashboardDiabetes DashboardOverdue Patient List

{{#if (eq isAccessible 0)}}
⚠️ Overdue patient list is available only at the facility and sub-facility levels.
{{else if (eq isAllowed 0)}}
⚠️ Access Denied: Ask admin to add to one of these teams: {{{requiredGroups}}}
{{/if}}
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF('${selected_level}',''),'0')::int IN (3, 4, 10) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "isAccessible",
  COALESCE(NULLIF('$isAllowed', ''), '0')::int AS "isAllowed",
  '${requiredGroups}' AS "requiredGroups"

payload.rawSql:
INSERT INTO call_results (patient_id, call_date, result_type, removed_reason, org_unit_id)
VALUES (
  '${payload.patient_id}',
  CURRENT_DATE,
  CASE
    WHEN '${payload.removed_reason}' IN ('Agreed to visit', 'Pending to call', 'Call again later')
      THEN NULL
    ELSE 'removed_from_overdue_list'
  END,
  '${payload.removed_reason}',
  (SELECT org_unit_id FROM patients WHERE patient_id='${payload.patient_id}' LIMIT 1)
)
ON CONFLICT (patient_id, call_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  result_type = EXCLUDED.result_type,
  removed_reason = EXCLUDED.removed_reason;

targets.rawSql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  patient_id,
  patient_name,
  registration_date,
  birth_date,
  gender,
  phone_number,
  (SELECT name FROM org_units WHERE id = h.org_unit_id) AS facility,
  last_visit_date,
  last_bp_diastolic,
  last_bp_systolic,
  last_call_date,
  last_call_result AS result_type,
  COALESCE(removed_reason, '-') AS removed_reason,
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(birth_date)) AS age_years,
  (CURRENT_DATE - last_visit_date::date) AS days_since_last_visit,
  CASE
    WHEN last_bp_systolic IS NOT NULL AND last_bp_diastolic IS NOT NULL
      THEN CONCAT(
        last_bp_systolic::int,
        '/',
        last_bp_diastolic::int
      )
    ELSE NULL
  END AS last_bp
FROM HEART360_OVERDUE_PATIENTS h
WHERE org_unit_id IN (SELECT id FROM get_descendant_ids(((SELECT ou.id FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1))))
  AND last_visit_date < now() - interval '45 days'
  AND ${selected_level} IN (3, 4, 10)
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

SELECT * FROM (
select 'Pending to call' as option, 1 as sort
union select 'Agreed to visit', 2
union select 'Call again later', 3
union select 'Already visited puskesmas', 4
union select 'Multiple failed contact attempts', 5
union select 'Wrong phone number', 6
union select 'Moved out of catchment area', 7
union select 'Transferred to another puskesmas', 8
union select 'Refused to return', 9
union select 'Died', 10
union select 'Other reason', 11
order by sort
) AS master_access_control WHERE '${isAllowed}' = '1'

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM org_units WHERE level = 1 ORDER BY name

query.rawSql: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM org_units WHERE level = 1 ORDER BY name

list.definition: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM org_units WHERE level = 2 AND parent_id::text = '${region}' ORDER BY name

query.rawSql: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM org_units WHERE level = 2 AND parent_id::text = '${region}' ORDER BY name

list.definition: SELECT 'All' AS __text, '0' AS __value UNION ALL SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM org_units WHERE level = 3 AND parent_id::text = '${district}' AND '${district}' != '0' ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT ou.level AS __value FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1

query.rawSql: SELECT ou.level AS __value FROM org_units ou WHERE ou.id::text = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '') LIMIT 1

list.definition: SELECT CASE WHEN is_admin = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __value FROM grafana_schema.user WHERE id = ${__user.id} LIMIT 1
list.name: isAdmin

query.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_admin = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS __value FROM grafana_schema.user WHERE id = ${__user.id} LIMIT 1

list.definition:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(1), 0) AS is_allowed
FROM grafana_schema.user u
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND (
      u.is_admin = true
      OR t.name IN (
          SELECT (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(lin.ancestor_id, 'patients') LIMIT 1)
          FROM heart360tk_schema.org_unit_lineage lin
          WHERE lin.org_unit_id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int
      )
      OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM heart360tk_schema.hierarchy_config hc
          WHERE t.name = 'heart360tk_' || hc.var_name || '_view_patients_ALL'
            AND hc.level <= (SELECT level FROM heart360tk_schema.org_units WHERE id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int LIMIT 1)
      )
  )
list.name: isAllowed

query.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(1), 0) AS is_allowed
FROM grafana_schema.user u
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT OUTER JOIN grafana_schema.team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND (
      u.is_admin = true
      OR t.name IN (
          SELECT (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(lin.ancestor_id, 'patients') LIMIT 1)
          FROM heart360tk_schema.org_unit_lineage lin
          WHERE lin.org_unit_id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int
      )
      OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM heart360tk_schema.hierarchy_config hc
          WHERE t.name = 'heart360tk_' || hc.var_name || '_view_patients_ALL'
            AND hc.level <= (SELECT level FROM heart360tk_schema.org_units WHERE id = NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int LIMIT 1)
      )
  )

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE( '' || (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int, 'patients') LIMIT 1) || ', or an ' || '_ALL access team', 'None' ) AS required_groups
list.name: requiredGroups

query.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE( '' || (SELECT group_name FROM heart360tk_schema.get_access_groups(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM '${org_unit}'), '')::int, 'patients') LIMIT 1) || ', or an ' || '_ALL access team', 'None' ) AS required_groups
